text.title: Filesystem Backup with Restic Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the backup-filesystem-restic methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scope-and-skip
step.decision-gate: If scope == skip, halt and apply the alternative methodology suggested by the decision tree.

step.name: collect-inputs
step.action: Gather the inputs declared in the Prerequisites table.

step.name: draft-artefact
step.action: Fill the relevant template under `templates/`; ensure every required schema field has a non-default value.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run the validator; address violations until exit 0.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, fix violations and re-run; do not proceed with an unvalidated artefact.

step.name: register-and-monitor
step.action: Commit + register + wire monitoring/alerting per the rules.
